---
title: "William Gibbs"
---

## William Gibbs

**Dates:** (1790-1875)

### Description

businessman

### Biography

He married (1839) Matilda Blanche Crawley-Boevey (1817/8-1887).  His aunt Mary Gibbs (d.1819) had married the Rev. Charles Crawley (1756-1849), brother of CMY’s paternal grandmother Catharina (Crawley) Yonge, the first of many marriages connecting the various families.  His wife was the granddaughter of Charles and Catharina Crawley’s eldest brother Sir Thomas Crawley-Boevey 2nd Bt. (1745-1818).

### Letters

- Letter from [May 1894]
- Letter from St. Michael [29 September 1887]
- Letter from April 6, 1875
- Letter from Aug 13th 1874
- Letter from Jany 17th 1872
- Letter from [check 1872]
- Letter from Oct 11th [1869 [[footnote:2]]]
- Letter from Novr 24th 1858

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
